titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 23: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 23. (A.R. No. 252 of 1944.) VĀLIKAṆḌAPURAM, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south walls of the central shrine in the Vālikaṇḍēśvara temple.

Records that BhUtam Paṇḍāri residing at MaṅgalapuramThe Vaigai river bed inscription of Pāṇḍya King Chēndaṉ records the creation of the city Maggalāpuram by the above King. The editor of the record identified this city with Maggalam in Sattur Taluk Ramanathapuram District. See (Ep. Ind., Vol. XXXVIII pp. 31-32) It is likely that Maggalāpuram of Vaigai inscription and the one that occurs in this record are the same.in Pāṇḍi-nāḍu entrusted seven kaḻañju of gold with the nagarattār for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mahādēva of TiruvālIśvaram at VAlikaṇḍapuram in Vaṉ-nāḍu. with the interest of one uḻakku oil daily by the standard measure of VAlikaṇḍapuram (VAlikaṇḍapurattu nārāyattāl).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraiko
ṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉ
maṟku yāṇṭu 10 8- Āva
tu vaṉṉāṭṭu vālikaṇ
ṭapuṟattu tiruvāliśva
rattu ma(ā)hadevark
ku Oru nontā viḷakkoṉṟu
kku pāṇṭiñāṭṭu maṅkala
purattiruntu vāḻum pūta
m paṇṭāri nakarattār kaiva
ḻi vaitta poṉ Eḻu kaḻa
ñcu Ippoṉṉukkup pa
licai vālikaṇṭapuṟattu
nārāyattāl nicati U
ḻak keṇṇai ney Aṭṭak
kaṭavār nakarattāritu panmā
heśvararrakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
